summary.what: Fix doctor --fix scope mismatch for stale Claude hook cleanup
summary.why: Install(true) hardcoded project-local scope, so retired hooks in global settings survived --fix
summary.how: Pass detected scope from Detect() through to Install(scope=="project") in checkAgentEnvStaleness

notes: User feedback reported doctor --fix leaving PreToolUse in place. Root cause was scope mismatch: Detect() found stale hooks in global settings, but Install(true) always wrote to project-local. The retired-event cleanup in addTimbersHooks worked correctly — it just never ran against the right file.
